notes: Game is unplayable cause of blinking problems on the game and interface windows. The problems appear immediatly after connection.
title: Meridian 59

notes:
As the previous post states, after character creation, the interface is very flickery and a good portion of the time you cannot see the text window, your inventory, etc.

To fix:
At the top left of the window, go to Game, then Configuration, then check the box for Software Renderer and restart the game.  After this, the game seems to run well including adjustments to the interface including background and text colors.
title: Meridian 59
